zh.lifeSummary: 當Ludwig von Württemberg III於1166年出生時，他的父親Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II30歲，母親Willibirg von Kirchberg27歲。他於大約1194年與Benedikta在德國爾特波格斯圖特加特結婚。他去世於1241年享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ludwig von Württemberg III于1166年出生时，他的父亲Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II30岁，母亲Willibirg von Kirchberg27岁。他于大约1194年与Benedikta在德国爾特波格斯圖特加特结婚。他去世于1241年享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Ludwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: When Ludwig von Württemberg III was born in 1166, his father, Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II, was 30 and his mother, Willibirg von Kirchberg, was 27. He married Benedikta about 1194, in Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany. He died in 1241, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ludwig von Württemberg III est né en 1166, son père, Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Willibirg von Kirchberg, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Benedikta environ 1194, à Stuttgart, Württemberg, Allemagne. Il est décédé en 1241, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ludwig von Württemberg III 1166 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II 30 und seine Mutter Willibirg von Kirchberg 27. Er hat um 1194 in Stuttgart, Württemberg, Deutschland Benedikta geheiratet. Er starb 1241 im Alter von 75 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig von Württemberg III è nato il nel 1166, il suo padre, Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Willibirg von Kirchberg, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Benedikta circa 1194, nel Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germania. Morì nel 1241, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ludwig von Württemberg IIIが1166年に生まれた時，父Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG IIは30歳，母Willibirg von Kirchbergは27歳であった。約1194年にドイツウuルッテンバーグストゥットガートでBenediktaと結婚した。彼は1241年に75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ludwig von Württemberg III(이)가 1166년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Willibirg von Kirchberg(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1194년 독일 wu르테버그 스투트가트에서 Benedikta(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1241년 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig von Württemberg III nasceu em 1166, seu pai, Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Willibirg von Kirchberg, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Benedikta aproximadamente 1194, em Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha. Ele faleceu em 1241, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ludwig von Württemberg III родился в 1166 г., его отцу по имени Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Willibirg von Kirchberg, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Benedikta около 1194 г. в местности стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия. Он умер в 1241 г. в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ludwig von Württemberg III nació en 1166, su papá, Ludwig VON WÜRTTEMBERG II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Willibirg von Kirchberg, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Benedikta aproximadamente 1194, en Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemania. Murió en 1241, a la edad de 75 años.
